name: Kanban Board
description: Column-based board with draggable cards organized by status. Used for order management, deal pipelines, task workflows, and project tracking.

slots.column: Vertical lane per status with header (title + count Badge) and scrollable card list
slots.card: Card per item with title, description snippet, assignee Chip, priority Badge
slots.column-header: Status label + item count + optional add Button
